candidates.description_inert_text: Maybe alien technology isn't so foreign after all. This Firefox crop circle sprouted up in a cornfield in Oregon, but its origins are no mystery. In 2006, the Oregon State University Linux Users group created the giant logo — spanning more than 45,000 sq. ft. — to celebrate the Web browser's 50 millionth download. Read more: http://www.time.com/time/specials/packages/article/0,28804,1881770_1881787_1881775,00.html#ixzz16iCWcVZg
